paragraphs: I'm a **Social Media Manager, Digital Solutions Coordinator, and Video Editor** based in Raipur, India. With over five years in the industry, I've worked with startups, established studios like **Technicolor MPC**, and independent brands.

At **NexNeuro**, I served as Digital Marketing Manager and Creative Producer — managing social media across 6 platforms, hosting and editing the **NexVaani Podcast**, and driving growth to 500+ LinkedIn followers and 500+ on Instagram. I also applied **AI & automation tools** to streamline content workflows and publishing consistency.
I combine creative production skills with strategic digital coordination — building efficient systems, leveraging AI tools, and using platform insights to deliver consistent, high-performing results.

infoCards.label: Location
infoCards.title: Raipur, India
infoCards.sub: Open to Remote, Hybrid & Onsite Opportunities
